conclusion: c2 grouped_compact MoE plus accepted projection-dispatch metadata now has profiler-backed retained-bench evidence. Generated-token equality remains [137,137], primitive correctness is loaded/passed, profiler provenance/kernel-duration blockers are absent, batch_execution.blockers is empty, grouped MoE metadata is retained-clean, and projection dispatch selects gemv_awq_selected_dual_pack8_strided_c2 with empty blockers. No throughput claim is made because aggregate_vs_c1 remains below the retained threshold.
remaining_blockers: c2 aggregate_vs_c1 scaling remains below retained performance threshold
c4/c8 grouped_compact+projection profiler evidence is not captured
c4/c8 full attention still uses native_batch_row_chunks and native_caware_decode=false
c8 repeatability remains open before promotion

decision_reason_summary: scaling.ratios.aggregate_vs_c1 must be > 1.0 for retained performance claim
